query: SELECT id, syncType, syncStatus, customersCreated, customersUpdated, ordersCreated, ordersUpdated, paymentsProcessed, LEFT(errorMessage, 300) as errMsg, startedAt, completedAt FROM qb_sync_log ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
